title: borneacanthus stenothyrsus
intro: Borneacanthus stenothyrsus is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as a type of mint or mint family plant. It is native to the tropical regions of Borneo and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating digestive issues. Borneacanthus stenothyrsus is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
